system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Extract confirmed configuration key values from haystack
args.prompt:
Read the file ~/.claude/haystack.txt and find every paragraph containing the phrase "configuration key" that is marked as confirmed (look for "confirmed-by-regional-verification-panel" phrasing). Exclude any paragraphs marked as "draft", "preliminary", or "superseded" — those are decoys.

Find the TRUE (entity, value) pairs for these five entities:
- Ironwell
- Jorrith
- Kilthorne
- Larren
- Maerstone

For each entity, find the paragraph that contains their name AND "configuration key" AND is confirmed (not draft/preliminary/superseded). Extract the exact value associated with each entity, including any unit suffix (e.g., "88.7 MHz").

Report back each entity and its confirmed value exactly as printed in the haystack. This is research only — do not modify any files.
